headline: Aecon Announces Filing of Final Short Form Prospectus in Connection with Offering of Common Shares
summary: Aecon Group Inc. (TSX: ARE) ("Aecon" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that in connection with the previously announced agreement to sell, on a bought deal basis, 3,822,000 common shares (the "Shares") from treasury to a syndicate of underwriters led by CIBC Capital Markets and TD Securities Inc. (the "Underwriters"), Aecon has filed a final short form prospectus dated March 24, 2026 (the "Final Prospectus") with the securities commissions or other similar regulatory authorities in all pr
